base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pipes — a tile from 1990 super mario world. Pipe tiles — warp pipes + aboveground tube variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pipe tiles — warp pipes + aboveground tube variants
